metadata.title: Flux Kontext API — AI Image Editing | AI Image Editor Free
metadata.description: Flux Kontext on Kie.ai: context-aware image generation and editing. Quickstart, features, and how to run it from our AI image generator.

page.title: Flux Kontext
page.description: Flux Kontext excels at image-conditioned workflows — keep identity, layout, or style while applying large prompt-driven changes.

hero.title: Flux Kontext — Image API
hero.description: Use Flux Kontext when you need strong reference fidelity and editable outputs. Follow the Kie.ai Flux Kontext quickstart for request fields and callbacks.
hero.tip: Docs: Flux Kontext quickstart →

images.title: Example visuals
images.description: Placeholder gallery — tag showcases with flux-kontext to pull live examples.

images.prompt: Same character, new outfit — editorial lighting
Product swap on identical scene layout
Sketch to render while preserving composition

capabilities.title: Flux Kontext strengths
capabilities.description: Designed for editing and transformation tasks that depend on a reference image or strong scene context.

items.title: Context-aware edits
items.description: Apply changes without throwing away structure you want to keep.

items.title: Creative control
items.description: Combine prompts with references for iterative art-direction workflows.

items.title: Developer-friendly
items.description: Use Kie.ai quickstart patterns for task creation and polling.

items.question: When choose Kontext vs plain text-to-image?
items.answer: Prefer Kontext when the input image must influence the result — style transfer, inpainting-style edits, or identity-preserving changes.

cta.title: Try Flux workflows
cta.description: Open the generator and pick a model that matches your Kie.ai configuration.
